# Instilligent Limited

> AI consultancy and product studio building intelligent solutions for regulated industries across New Zealand, Australia, and Southeast Asia.

## About

Instilligent is a New Zealand-based software company that combines deep AI expertise with hands-on consulting to help organisations in regulated industries move faster, stay compliant, and build smarter.

## Products

- [Modular Compliance](https://modularcompliance.com): Cloud-based compliance management platform for NZ and AU SMEs. Supports ISO 27001, SOC 2, NZ Privacy Act, AML/CFT, Health and Safety, Food Safety, and more. From NZD 199/month.
- [Our New Normal](https://ournewnormal.co.nz): New Zealand business directory and local insights platform.
- [BossBoard](https://bossboard.instilligent.com): Health and safety compliance for NZ tradespeople.
- [CodeHumanist](https://codehumanist.com): Developer tools and AI-powered productivity.
- [ProofOnce](https://proofonce.com): Document and identity verification platform.

## Services

- AI Consulting and Advisory
- Specialist Contracting
- Technology Strategy
- Systems Integration
- Compliance Automation
